name: Mid-County Senior Center
description:
You need to be a member and over 50 to play pickleball at Mid-County. Membership is free!

Session time and days subject to change. Please visit Mid-County's website to learn more: https://midcountyseniorcenter.org/programs-services/#Schedule

Advance sign up for pickleball sessions is required. Please visit Mid-County's scheduling website and click the green "login" button to learn more:
https://schedulesplus.com/midco/kiosk/dspschedules.do?
fees: Members only — $2.50 for 1-hour sessions, $5.00 for 2-hour sessions

name: The Picklr Newark
description: Picklr Newark is a place to play pickleball in Newark, DE. There will be 12 indoor premier acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is recommened for the best playing experience. You can reserve the courts as a member or non-member. Players have access to drinks, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, wheelchair accessibility, coaches, clinics, and lessons, and a world-class pro shop. With over 40,000 square feet of luxury pickleball you will not be disappointed. The club offers sound baffles over each court to reduce noise, a warm up and cool down area along with a dinking wall, a well-designed event space for parties, events, and corporate outings, beautiful lockers,  showers, and restrooms. The club offers a world-class pro-shop with the best paddles and pickleball equipment on the market. Demo paddles of the top 25 paddles are available as well. The club will be open 6am – 11am Mon – Sun. The membership will provide nation-wide club access, member court reservations 7 Days in advance, 4 guest passes a month, 4 clinics a month, unlimited access to Picklr leagues, tournaments, and open play. The Picklr offers the propietary Wingfield AI Trainer and the Erne ball machine as well for player training development.
fees: Members only — See website for details
